list.name: Default Changelist
list.comment: Add auth and wallet API to Poker Server MVP with session handling, user profiles, wallet adjustments, and ledger tracking. Extend tests, docs, and CLI scripts to ensure parity and coverage.

task.summary: Introduce modern client scaffold with initial dependencies, configurations, and asset structure.
Introduce modern client scaffold with initial dependencies, configurations, and asset structure.
Expand Texas Hold'em engine with betting flow, side-pot payouts, client action DTOs, and comprehensive test coverage.
Add `package-lock.json` for the modern Poker workspace with updated dependencies and configurations
Add Poker Server MVP with hand lifecycle, deterministic replay, and lifecycle/replay tests.
Add auth and wallet API to Poker Server MVP with session handling, user profiles, wallet adjustments, and ledger tracking. Extend tests, docs, and CLI scripts to ensure parity and coverage.

MESSAGE.value: Introduce modern client scaffold with initial dependencies, configurations, and asset structure.
Expand Texas Hold'em engine with betting flow, side-pot payouts, client action DTOs, and comprehensive test coverage.
Add `package-lock.json` for the modern Poker workspace with updated dependencies and configurations
Add Poker Server MVP with hand lifecycle, deterministic replay, and lifecycle/replay tests.
Add auth and wallet API to Poker Server MVP with session handling, user profiles, wallet adjustments, and ledger tracking. Extend tests, docs, and CLI scripts to ensure parity and coverage.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add auth and wallet API to Poker Server MVP with session handling, user profiles, wallet adjustments, and ledger tracking. Extend tests, docs, and CLI scripts to ensure parity and coverage.
